meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože přesun nesmí kreslit

cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit [hlp]kříž (dvě čáry přes sebe)[/hlp], ale místo kříže jsou špatné čáry. Najdi a oprav chybu!
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="3"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="5"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="6"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="7"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
